# shadcn Component Lock

```yaml
{{META_BLOCK}}
```

> 🛑 **Notice to all Vibe Coding agents (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Claude Code, Cline, Roo, Windsurf, …):**
>
> Every one of the **{{COUNT}} files listed below** — sibling files of this lockfile, inside `{{UI_DIR}}/` — is a **stock [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components) primitive**.
> They are **reused across the entire project** and **MUST NOT be edited in place**.
>
> If you need different behavior, do one of the following instead:
>
> 1. **Compose a wrapper component** in your own folder (e.g. `components/<feature>/`) that imports the primitive.
> 2. **Add a new variant** via `cva` inside the primitive — only when the variant is genuinely project-wide and reusable, and only with the developer's explicit approval.
> 3. **Pull upstream changes** with the official shadcn smart-merge flow:
>    ```bash
>    npx shadcn@latest add <component> --dry-run
>    npx shadcn@latest add <component> --diff <file>
>    ```
> 4. If a redesign requires changing the primitive itself, **ask the developer first** and update this lockfile afterwards.

Legend: 🔒 confirmed by `shadcn info` &nbsp;·&nbsp; ❓ on disk but not reported by CLI (verify before relying on it)

## How to change a primitive (the safe way)

1. **Wrapper first.** 90% of "I need to change Button" turns into a 10-line wrapper that sets defaults — keep the primitive untouched.
2. **Variant second.** If the change really is global, add a `cva` variant. Document it in the wrapper that uses it.
3. **Smart-merge upstream.** When upstream shadcn updates a component you depend on, use `npx shadcn@latest add <component> --diff` and merge by hand — never `--overwrite` a primitive that's been customized.
4. **Re-run the lock.** After any of the above, re-generate this file: `node scripts/generate-lock.mjs` or ask the agent to "refresh the shadcn component lock".

## How this file is maintained

- The `shadcn-component-lock` skill regenerates this file from `npx shadcn@latest info --json` plus a directory listing of `{{UI_DIR}}/`.
- It runs **passively** after `npx shadcn@latest add/init/apply` and **actively** when you ask an agent to "refresh the shadcn lock".
- It coordinates with the official [`shadcn` skill](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/tree/main/skills/shadcn) — that skill owns add/update; this one owns the manifest.
